title: murraya glenieii
intro: Murraya glenieii, also known as Lemon Verbena or Mountain Lemon, is a plant species native to Australia, characterized by its small, white flowers and distinctive citrus scent. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Murraya glenieii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Murraya glenieii include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed in various forms to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
